title: chupalon endresii
side_effects: Chupalon endresii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing vomiting, diarrhea, and stomach cramps in individuals who ingest its leaves or flowers. In some cases, prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils can lead to allergic reactions, including skin irritation, itching, and respiratory issues. Furthermore, improper use of chupalon endresii can also cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue due to its toxic compounds. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant's parts can result in liver and kidney damage, requiring immediate medical attention.
